lines.speaker: mad melvin96
lines.text: Hey there! Do you have a grapple I can borrow?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I might have one, but I need it myself. Why do you need a grapple?

lines.speaker: mad melvin96
lines.text: I need it to grapple to that pillar over there and get some treasure of course. What else could I need it for?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I mean that makes sense I suppose. How did you end up here?

lines.speaker: mad melvin96
lines.text: Well, I made my way to Morytania in search of a place called the Ba... Barlows? I've heard it's a great way to earn gold.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Barrows.

lines.speaker: mad melvin96
lines.text: Yeah, that's what I said!

lines.speaker: mad melvin96
lines.text: Anyways, I got lost on the way here and was abducted by some vampyres! However, I'm so sneaky I managed to escape and find this place.

lines.speaker: mad melvin96
lines.text: The weird hooded guy at the top said that if I get him some hollow marks, he'll help me escape.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You mean Hallowed marks.

lines.speaker: mad melvin96
lines.text: Yeah, that's what I said. Don't you listen?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: *sigh*

lines.speaker: mad melvin96
lines.text: So, can I borrow a grapple?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I don't have a grapple on me.

lines.speaker: mad melvin96
lines.text: Well, you're clearly a noob then.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I do have a spare grapple. I'm not sure you'd be able to use it to get across that gap though, what is your Ranged level?

lines.speaker: mad melvin96
lines.text: Pfft,I'm level 50 Ranged. Over half-way to 99, getting over there will be a breeze.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You need 62 Ranged to make it across that gap.

lines.speaker: mad melvin96
lines.text: Maybe you do with that attitude.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I do have a spare grapple, although I spent a lot of Hallowed marks to obtain it so you can't have it.

lines.speaker: mad melvin96
lines.text: Keep your grapple then noob. I can make that jump without it anyway.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh yeah? What's your agility level?

lines.speaker: mad melvin96
lines.text: None of your business.
